title: Routines
subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.

toast.addTrigger: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
toast.draftSaved: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
toast.couldNotUpdate: Paperclip could not update the routine.
toast.couldNotStart: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
toast.setAgentFirst: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.

composer.title: New routine
composer.subtitle: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
composer.advancedDeliveryDesc: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
composer.afterCreation: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

concurrencyPolicy.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrencyPolicy.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrencyPolicy.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catchUpPolicy.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUpPolicy.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

noRoutinesYet: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
